description: A preregistered, pass@1 comparison on real historical repository issues with hidden behavioral tests.

controls.case_retry_policy: No retries, no best-of-n, and no favorable-sample replacement.
controls.network_policy: Task prompts require offline work. Source workspaces have a single synthetic baseline commit and no remote.

tasks.prompt: Fix issue #798 in this Bytes repository. Buf::get_int, get_int_le, and get_int_ne panic when nbytes is 0 because sign extension attempts a 64-bit shift. A zero-width signed read must behave consistently with get_uint: return 0 and consume no bytes, for every Buf implementation and endian variant. Work offline, do not inspect git history or any remote, do not modify tests, and make the smallest production-quality implementation change. Run relevant tests before finishing.

Fix the fd CLI bug described in PR #2036. The existing path-separator diagnostic validates only the primary positional pattern. An --and pattern is matched against the file name in the same way, but `fd foo --and nonexistent/path` currently exits successfully with no results. Apply the same diagnostic to every --and pattern while preserving the --full-path escape hatch and the existing Windows backslash behavior. Work offline, do not inspect git history or any remote, do not modify tests or CHANGELOG.md, and make a focused production-quality change. Run relevant tests before finishing.

Fix Pactrail's completed-discard recovery bug. Calling `pactrail discard RUN_ID --json` a second time currently fails after the first call removes the candidate workspace. Discard must be idempotent. It must also recover an interrupted operation where the durable event state is Discarded but the receipt still says ReadyToApply: rebuild and persist the discarded receipt from the durable event head. Preserve receipt integrity, retained review artifacts, and explicit errors for inconsistent state/workspace combinations. Work offline, do not inspect git history or any remote, do not modify tests or documentation, and implement the smallest coherent production-quality fix. Run relevant tests before finishing.
